headline: This Pharma Stock Is Surging 40%. Neurocrine Is Buying It in $2.9 Billion Deal.
summary: Soleno Therapeutics  stock surged 40% in premarket trading Monday after Neurocrine Biosciences announced it had agreed to buy the company in a deal worth $2.9 billion.  Neurocrine Biosciences  said that it had agreed to buy Soleno—the maker of a drug to treat extreme hunger—for $53 per share in cash, representing a total deal value of $2.9 billion.  Shares in Soleno jumped 40% in the Monday premarket to $54.95 after the stock closed Thursday at $39.49.
